title: paspalum thrasyoides
intro: Paspalum thrasyoides is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions, specifically in the Americas, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, with its roots and leaves used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Paspalum thrasyoides include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations involving Paspalum thrasyoides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to create teas, tonics, and salves for external and internal use.
